title: Footpaths: Creates Paths Where You Walk!
description: Creates natural paths where you walk often
body:
Footpaths, originally created by kieranvs for Minecraft 1.7.2, adds natural path formation as grass gradually wears down through repeated movement or jumps by players and animals, creating organic and immersive trails over time.

![footpaths by sheeps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64bb4a366a979576cb9cd9282f9e8ce300dc3831.png)

All path stages:

![All path stages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01f89410d05b6ca6b5716f92ce1a52250ba99b88.png)
